intent: Debug add-to-cart and order completion failures on DigitalOcean-hosted Medusa storefront after re-setup
decisions: SameSite=Lax→None fix was premature — shilamurti.com and admin.shilamurti.com are same-site, not cross-origin
Root cause of 401 was KV 500 with error swallowed, not cookie policy
CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID changed when admin was recreated — must update both DO env vars and local .env files
Lock logic uses kvHybrid.ts (prefers Upstash) while session uses kv.ts — two separate KV clients in storefront
Added diagnostic logging to kvHybrid.ts to expose actual fetch failure cause (DNS/TLS/connection)
failed_approaches: SameSite=None fix — wrong diagnosis, same-site subdomain doesn't need None
Rotating CF_KV_API_TOKEN — old namespace ID was also wrong, rotating token alone didn't fix 500
Removing Upstash env vars and redeploying — lock still failed with 'fetch failed', DO requires rebuild not just restart
Making lock fail-open — user rejected, wanted root cause fixed instead
warnings: saveCartIdToSession() catches ALL errors silently — KV failures look like success on frontend, only visible in backend terminal
Recreating Medusa admin generates a new CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID — always verify namespace ID after admin re-setup
kvHybrid.ts prefers Upstash for atomic locks — if KV_REST_API_URL is set (even stale), it tries Upstash first and fails
Next.js on DO reads env vars at build time — removing env vars requires full redeploy/rebuild, not just restart
Order completion is fail-closed on KV unreachable — all orders blocked if storefront KV fetch fails
resolution: KV session 500 fixed by correcting CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID and rotating token; lock 'fetch failed' root cause still being diagnosed via added diagnostic logging
error_signatures: CART_SESSION_MISSING: No cart session found. Please refresh the page and try again.
Sales channel sc_01KMPXT8E89SYHS9X2AMCSER69 is not associated with any stock location for variant
cause_chain: 401 on line-items POST → assumed SameSite cookie policy → actual cause: cart-session POST silently returning 500 so no cookie was ever set
cart-session POST 500 → assumed wrong API token → actual cause: CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID changed when admin was recreated, old namespace ID caused Cloudflare auth error

order completion lock 'TypeError: fetch failed' → assumed env var misconfiguration → actual cause still unknown — storefront KV fetch to Cloudflare API fails entirely in DO environment, diagnostic logging added to get real error cause
file_dependencies: Recreating Medusa admin requires updating CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID in both .env, .env.production, and all DO environment variable sets
Storefront lock (distributedLock.ts) uses kvHybrid.ts which has different provider priority than backend kv.ts — same env vars behave differently
DO Next.js storefront env var changes require full redeploy/rebuild — runtime changes alone do not take effect
key_insight: When Medusa admin is recreated on DO, the Cloudflare KV namespace ID changes — always verify and update CF_KV_NAMESPACE_ID everywhere (local .env, .env.production, DO backend env vars, DO storefront env vars) or all cart session writes will 500.
